User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user profile within the NEU Library Access System, storing their basic information and access role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. Corresponds to Firebase Authentication UID.

role.description: The access role of the user within the system. (enum: 'admin', 'user')

college_office.description: The college or office the user is affiliated with. Can be null.

is_blocked.description: Indicates if the user's access to the system is blocked. Defaults to false.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

VisitLog.title: VisitLog
VisitLog.description: Records each visit to the library by a user, including the purpose and time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VisitLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made the visit. (Relationship: User 1:N VisitLog)

email.description: The email of the user at the time of the visit. Denormalized from User for easier querying and historical accuracy.

reason.description: The purpose or reason for the user's visit to the library.

timestamp.description: Server timestamp when the visit was recorded.

entryDate.description: The date of the visit in YYYY-MM-DD format for simplified date-based querying.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The document ID (`userId`) corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID. Includes the 'role' field for database access control (DBAC) and 'is_blocked' status. Provides explicit path-based ownership for individual users.

Stores individual visit logs, nested under the owning user's profile. The 'userId' field within each document, along with the hierarchical path, provides denormalized authorization context, enabling authorization independence. This structure supports secure QAPs for listing user-specific visit logs. Includes denormalized 'email' for historical accuracy.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this visit log. Corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: visitLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific visit log entry.
